title: How China Can Bring Sunshine to Korea
summary: John S. Park, project leader of the North Korea Analysis Group at the Kennedy School of Government, argues that South Korea could economically engage North Korea more effectively by bringing in a third player — China.
body: Overview John S. Park, project leader of the North Korea Analysis Group at the Kennedy School of Government, argues that South Korea could economically engage North Korea more effectively by bringing in a third player — China.
